statusLine.command: input=$(cat); user=$(whoami); dir=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); if [ -d "$dir/.git" ]; then branch=$(cd "$dir" && git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo 'detached'); git_status=$(cd "$dir" && git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | wc -l); if [ "$git_status" -gt 0 ]; then git_info=" [$branch*]"; else git_info=" [$branch]"; fi; else git_info=""; fi; printf "\033[2m%s@%s:%s%s | %s\033[0m" "$user" "$(hostname -s)" "$(basename "$dir")" "$git_info" "$model"
